name: Kabocha Hummus
instructions: Wash kabocha. Cut kabocha in quarters. Scoop and remove seeds.
Steam kabocha in Rational until cooked through, 5-10 min. Remove and cool on rack.
Heat olive oil gently, with garlic to confit. Do not let it color, just let it cook through on low heat. 5-10 min.
Remove oil from heat. Add pumpkin seeds. Allow to cool and set aside.
In food processor, scoop kabocha meat (no skin). Add oil, garlic, pumpkin seeds, verjus or cider vinegar, salt.
Puree until chunky. Taste for seasoning. Label, date, store in quart containers.
